meaning: n.髻ｳ蜩肴ｵ区ｷｱ閾ｪ蜉ｨ隶ｰ蠖穂ｻｪ,蝗槫｣ｰ豺ｱ蠎ｦ隶ｰ蠖募勣
examples: But the exact way that Echograph will fit into Vimeo is still being figured out.
Echograph is a premium app that creates beautiful videos that look like animated GIFs.
On the business side, Nick Alt, who created Echograph, is now the head of all mobile products for Vimeo.
